title: allBIO 140L Compostable Kerbside Bin Bags/Garden Sacks – Pack of 30
features: Up to 33% thicker than other brands thereby preventing leakage and damage.
A possible savings of up to 42% compared to other major supermarkets.
Certified to EN-13432 and carry the European standard Seedling logo.
100% biodegradable and compostable, made from corn starch.
For home composting or local council food waste recycling collection service.
description: allBIO 140L Compostable Kerbside Bin Bags / Garden Sacks – Pack of 30 Product Description Contents: 3 rolls of compostable bags - 10 bags per roll. Bag Size: 140 Litre - Approx. 176cm rim x 130cm length with a gathered base. Designed For Strength These bags also now feature a "Star base", whereby the base of the bag is gathered together and sealed in such a way as to strengthen the bag. This design helps to prevent the bag from breaking when full of food waste, but does not affect the overall capacity or strength of the bag. These bags are also suitable for general garden waste. More Information All allBIO bin liners are certified compostable according to the European standard EN-13432 and bear the 'seedling' logo.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Food Waste, Garden Waste, Home Composting
